trending_videos.title: SPIDERMAN BRAND NEW DAY TRAILER BREAKDOWN! Every Easter Egg & Detail You Missed!
trending_videos.description:
Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer FRAME BY FRAME Breakdown & Analysis by New Rockstars’ Erik Voss! Get 10% off your first month of therapy at https://betterhelp.com/NewRockstars. #spiderman #spidermanbrandnewday #trailer  #sponsored

Here is EVERYTHING you missed in the trailer for Spider-Man Brand New Day (2026) - every clue for the MUTANTS, Jean Grey, even ROGUE?? What was removed from this trailer? Will Daredevil appear in this movie? Will Norman Osborn? Will Bruce Banner’s “savage” Hulk form? How will this movie set up Avengers Doomsday and Secret Wars? Erik Voss breaks down this trailer frame by frame for every callback to Andrew Garfield Spider-Man and Tobey Maguire Spider-Man and why these callbacks are so important to what’s really happening to Tom Holland Peter Parker in this movie!

We're back at the UCB Theater in Los Angeles on April 17th, come in person or stream anywhere. Tickets: https://ucbcomedy.com/show/new-rockstars-live-its-morbin-time

NEW ROCKSTARS NETWORK
youtube.
tags: spider-man brand new day trailer new rockstars
spider-man brand new day trailer reaction

trending_videos.title: First Round: UCF vs. UCLA
trending_videos.description: The Xfinity Mobile Arena proudly holds the UCF Knights and the UCLA Bruins in a beautiful NCAA Men's Basketball Championship first round matchup. These highly intelligent college teams plan to utilize exceptional speed to secure a major win.

trending_videos.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day - Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
A Brand New Day starts now.
Watch the official trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, exclusively in theatres July 31. Play Marvel’s Spider-Man 2, available now in the PlayStation Plus Game Catalog.

trending_videos.title: First Round: Prairie View A&M vs. Florida
trending_videos.description: This South Region contest brings the Prairie View A&M Panthers and Florida Gators directly into Benchmark International Arena in Tampa, Florida. Both extremely proud universities expect to utilize highly organized plays to dominate competition.

trending_videos.title: First Round: Queens vs. Purdue
trending_videos.description: The Enterprise Center features the Queens University Royals and the Purdue Boilermakers in an intense NCAA Tournament opening round matchup. Both excellent collegiate programs are seeking to advance deeper into this highly prominent bracket.

trending_videos.title: First Round: Missouri vs. Miami
trending_videos.description: The fantastic Enterprise Center holds the Missouri Tigers and the Miami Hurricanes for this thrilling NCAA Men's Basketball Championship battle. Expect these deeply dedicated student athletes to continuously showcase a brilliant offensive set.

trending_videos.title: Gutfeld!
trending_videos.description: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

trending_videos.title: First Round: Iowa vs. Clemson
trending_videos.description: Benchmark International Arena sets a pristine stage for the Iowa Hawkeyes and the Clemson Tigers in the NCAA Men's Basketball Championship. These two heavily prepared squads promise to orchestrate highly complex actions throughout the game.

trending_videos.title: Trim - Boat Remix (Feat. Pooh Shiesty) [Official Music Video]
trending_videos.description: Boat Remix (Feat. Pooh Shiesty) out now: https://itsmstrim.lnk.to/boatremix
